arts.sum: Aston Villa are aiming to make history when they lock horns with Paris Saint-Germain in the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final showdown tonight (8pm). Who will Aston Villa play in the Champions League semi-finals if they spark up PSG comeback?

arts.ttl: Bournemouth, Nottingham Forest Push Hard for £35M-Rated Chelsea Loanee Wanted by PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been leaning more on Ligue 1 talent to build a younger, more dynamic squad in recent windows. The arrivals of Bradley Barcola and Desire Doue from domestic rivals are clear examples of that shift. For years, the club faced criticism for ignoring the league’s top young talent, but things have changed under […] The post Bournemouth, Nottingham Forest Push Hard for £35M-Rated Chelsea Loanee Wanted by PSG appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Morgan Rogers: Man Utd face MAJOR competition for Aston Villa superstar
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly set to face significant competition for Aston Villa star Morgan Rogers during the upcoming summer transfer window. The 22-year-old has attracted a number of suitors following an immense campaign under Unai Emery and Man Utd have emerged as strong contenders to acquire his signature this summer amid their pursuit of several new attacking players.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery told what to do with Marcus Rashford as Aston Villa sent 'incredible' PSG message
arts.sum: But the former Villa captain has told Unai Emery he needs to start Ollie Watkins up front after criticising Marcus Rashford ’s performance in Parc des Princes last Wednesday as Villa were overwhelmed by arguably the best team in the competition. “It’s incredibly difficult because I think PSG without doubt are the best team I've witnessed in the competition, but it can be done,” he told talkSPORT .

arts.ttl: Premier League side eyeing summer move for Marcus Rashford if Aston Villa deal fails
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford dominated the transfer headlines in January, and he could do so again in the summer if Aston Villa do not sign him. arts.ttl: ‘Pool party and Gloria Gaynor’ – How chilled PSG are preparing for Aston Villa match
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have prepared for their second leg against Aston Villa in the Champions League quarterfinals this week with a pool party and plenty of Gloria Gaynor. That’s according to L’Equipe, who details PSG’s chilled out week in the run up to the big quarter-final second leg clash against Aston Villa.
